svg.text: Collect context: inbox messages, pipe inputs,
Parse and classify the incoming prompt —
what kind of task is this?
Pull relevant data from conversation history
Analyze code artifacts in context: symbols,
Identify which tools and MCP capabilities
Call the AI provider with assembled prompt.
loop back to REASON (up to 3 retries).
Run shell cmd in sandbox subprocess
Apply targeted replacement to a file
Query a search API; return results
Send message or broadcast to agents
Read from or append to conv. history
EVENTS EMITTED (fired via EventBus → WebSocket clients)
LLM PROVIDERS (16 total · configured via llm_factory)
✕ API keys never logged or returned in responses ✕ bash sandbox: no outbound network by default ✕ C ABI frozen — breaking change = major version bump
